name: Premium Carpenter
hours: Monday to Friday: 7am to 5pm | Saturday: By appointment

reviews.quote: We had our entire kitchen and bathroom renovated, and the results are incredible. The craftsmanship was flawless, and the team was professional, friendly, and always kept us updated.
reviews.name: Jess & Nathan

reviews.quote: Premium Carpenter built our dream deck and outdoor kitchen. The timber work is absolutely beautiful and the team was punctual, clean, and a pleasure to deal with.
reviews.name: Michael & Sarah

reviews.quote: From the first quote to the final walkthrough, everything was handled professionally. Our full home renovation turned out better than we imagined.
reviews.name: The Chen Family

reviews.quote: We needed custom cabinetry for our new build and Premium Carpenter delivered perfection. Every joint and every finish was immaculate.
reviews.name: David & Emma

faqs.q: How much does a full home renovation cost?
faqs.a: Every project is unique. We provide detailed, transparent quotes after an initial consultation and site visit. Costs depend on scope, materials, and timeline.

faqs.q: Do you build custom cabinetry and joinery?
faqs.a: Yes. Custom joinery is one of our specialties, from built in wardrobes to bespoke vanities and storage.

faqs.q: Can I renovate my bathroom and kitchen at the same time?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We often manage multi room renovations to minimise disruption and deliver a cohesive result across your home.

faqs.q: Can you handle both interior and exterior renovations?
faqs.a: Yes. From kitchen remodels to outdoor decks and pergolas, we manage carpentry and renovation work inside and out.

faqs.q: Do you service the whole Gold Coast?
faqs.a: Yes. We service the whole Gold Coast, with regular quotes across Coomera, Beenleigh, Yatala, Stapylton, Ormeau, Pimpama, Upper Coomera, Oxenford, Helensvale, and Hope Island.

faqs.q: Can you help with small carpentry repairs?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle small repairs, timber maintenance, door adjustments, fascia repairs, rot repairs, and larger renovation work.
Yes. Premium Carpenter is licensed and insured, and every project is quoted clearly before work begins.
Yes. We provide free quotes after understanding your project, location, access, materials, and the finish you want.

whyUs: Local expertise with Gold Coast properties
